web_results.title: 2026 Israeli–United States strikes on Iran - Wikipedia
web_results.description: On the morning of March 1, reports confirmed Iran fired missiles on Israel, Kuwait and Qatar. Shortly before midnight in Iran on 28 February, an unnamed Israeli official said that Khamenei had been killed in the air strikes and his body had been recovered and identified by intelligence sources.
